en: or are you just trying to stay warm in front of the refrigerator.
ko: 아니면 그냥 냉장고 앞에서 따뜻하게 있으려는 거야?
ja: それとも冷蔵庫の前で暖まろうとしてるの？
zhTW: 還是你只是想在冰箱前面取暖？
vi: Hay ban chi dang co giu am truoc tu lanh thoi?

en: Ow Oh wow you're feeling out there Oh wow your face is catching up with your mouth I work by Dad's.
ja: わあ、なかなか大胆だね。
vi: Oi, ban manh me that day.

en: office He is not your dad Why don't you torture your new family Hey just because my mother marries someone else doesn't mean he's my!
ko: 그는 네 아빠가 아니야. 왜 새로운 가족을 괴롭히지 않아?
ja: 彼はお前の父親じゃない。新しい家族を困らせたら？
zhTW: 他不是你爸。你怎麼不去煩你的新家人？
vi: Ong ay khong phai bo ban. Sao khong di phien gia dinh moi di?

en: father Actually Kato that's exactly what it means I hope you're not thinking of staying here I sure want to I'm.
ko: 사실, 카토, 그게 바로 의미하는 바야.
ja: 実はカトー、それがまさにそういう意味なんだ。
zhTW: 事實上，Kato，那正是它的意思。
vi: That ra, Kato, do chinh xac la y nghia cua no.

en: sure you do I got a place in Westwood near school Shouldn't you go to school on the East Coast I hear girls at NYU aren't at all.
ja: 学校の近くのウエストウッドに部屋がある。
zhTW: 我在學校附近的Westwood有個住處。
vi: Toi co cho o Westwood gan truong.

en: particular You're funny What's your problem Beba.
Infantry pure infiltrating machine gun fire You just got here and already you're playing couch commando Hey in some parts!
ko: 여기 막 도착했는데 벌써 소파에서 군대 놀이야?
ja: ここに着いたばかりなのにもうソファで軍人ごっこ？
zhTW: 你才剛到就已經在沙發上玩突擊隊了？
vi: Moi den ma da choi linh tren sofa roi?

en: of the universe maybe not in contempo casual but in some parts it's considered cool to know what's going on in the world Thank.
ja: 現代カジュアルではないかもしれないが、世界で何が起きているか知ることはクールだとされている。
zhTW: 也許不是現代休閒風，但在某些地方，了解世界大事被認為很酷。
vi: Co the khong phai phong cach thoi thuong, nhung o mot so noi, biet chuyen the gioi la dieu hay.

en: you Josh I so need lessons from you on how to be cool Tell me that part about Kenny G again.
ja: ジョシュ、あなたからクールになる方法を学ばないと。
zhTW: 謝了Josh，我真的需要跟你學怎麼變酷。
vi: Cam on Josh, toi can hoc cach tro nen cool tu ban lam.

en: Come on you chuckleheads get in here!
ko: 이리 와, 너희 바보들, 여기 들어와.
ja: おい、おバカさんたち、こっちに来なさい！
zhTW: 快來，你們這些傻瓜，進來！
vi: Nao, may dua ngo, vao day!

en: Josh are you still growing You look taller than you did at Easter I think so.
ja: ジョシュ、まだ成長してるの？
vi: Josh, ban van dang lon a?
